subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the mighty Cord of God! The dawn of guidance hath risen from the Orient of eternity, and the Sun of Truth hath shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بحبل الله المتین صبح هدی از مشرق بقا طلوع نمود و شمس حقیقت از افق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
